# CLOUDKIT_LOADED

****

An event that is fired when CloudKit JS is loaded. Used when `CloudKit.js` is loaded asynchronously.

## Declaration

```swift
const String CLOUDKIT_LOADED;
```

## Constants

- **BUILD_VERSION**: The CloudKit JS build number.
- **VERSION**: The version of CloudKit JS.
title: CLOUDKIT_LOADED
